role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained within script/language analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and climate cues consistent with the role.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Focused on plant species and agricultural patterns (deciduous forests, cereal crops).
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road infrastructure, guardrails, and railway standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (architecture, camera generation) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Germany. All agents adhered to their domains, providing concrete evidence (guardrails, roof tiles, vegetation) that was accurately reflected in the hypothesis evaluations. The tournament successfully used this evidence to narrow the field from 6 candidates to the correct winner.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of rolling hills and red-tiled roofs match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of temperate deciduous forests and pastures match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of steel guardrails and road width match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of architecture and camera quality match the image.
